feedItems.description: allocated £42.8m to Environment & Streets (≈£69 per resident)
allocated £227.6m to Adult Social Care (≈£366 per resident)
allocated £123.2m to Children's Social Care (≈£198 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £77 (5.0%) to £1616
